label: Terrain fleck data
description: Configuration for a fleck particle emitted by terrain on each tick.

velocitySpeedRange.label: Velocity speed range
velocitySpeedRange.description: Range of launch speed values for emitted flecks.

velocityAngleRange.label: Velocity angle range
velocityAngleRange.description: Range of launch angle values in degrees for emitted flecks.

rotationSpeedRange.label: Rotation speed range
rotationSpeedRange.description: Range of rotation speed values in degrees per tick for emitted flecks.

solidTicksRange.label: Solid ticks range
solidTicksRange.description: Range of lifetimes in ticks during which the fleck is fully opaque.

scaleRange.label: Scale range
scaleRange.description: Range of initial scale values for emitted flecks.
